Spine Road at the midpoint of the warehouse on the North side of the Road

There is a mature apple tree growing between the roadway and the face of the old blue warehouse (known as the Nimco Building) on the North side of the road. The fruit is plentiful and ripe in the late summer. Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit seas
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
Future home of the Gate City Community Gardens Foraging Garden Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: May-October.

At the park here along water street, right along the path by the river and near the statue, there are several highbush blueberry bushes.  Perfect picking height!  The berries are big, dark blue and delicious, ripening in mid to late summer.  Bring a container
